name: First Bite
description: Welcome to TasteMap! You've successfully completed your very first check-in.

name: Neighborhood Watch
description: Checked in at 10 different locations within the same district.

name: City Explorer
description: A true wanderer. You've explored and checked in at 50 different locations.

name: Night Owl
description: The city never sleeps, and neither do you. Completed 10 check-ins after 10 PM.

name: Early Bird
description: Caught the worm! Completed 10 check-ins before 8 AM.

name: Coffee Connoisseur
description: Fueled by caffeine. Visited 15 different coffee shops.

name: Caffeine Fiend
description: Your blood is 90% espresso. Visited 50 coffee shops.

name: Spice Seeker
description: Can handle the heat! Checked in at 5 restaurants with the 'Spicy' tag.

name: Fire Breather
description: Nothing is too hot for you. Checked in at 25 'Spicy' locations.

name: Sweet Tooth
description: Life is short, eat dessert first. Visited 10 dessert or pastry shops.

name: Sushi Master
description: Arigato! Checked in at 15 Japanese restaurants.

name: Ice Breaker
description: Joined your very first Group Room. Let the food hunt begin!

name: Party Animal
description: A true social butterfly. Successfully joined and checked in with 10 Group Rooms.

name: Squad Leader
description: Born to lead. Hosted 20 Group Rooms that ended in successful check-ins.

name: Taste Matchmaker
description: Master of algorithms! Your groups accepted the AI's 1st recommendation 50 times.

name: Local Guide
description: Helping others find good food. Left 5 text reviews.

name: Snapshot Guru
description: The camera eats first. Uploaded 25 food photos to your reviews.

name: Food Critic
description: Your opinion matters. Wrote 50 highly-rated, detailed reviews.

name: Michelin Inspector
description: The ultimate authority. Your reviews have received 1000+ helpful votes from the community.

name: Weekend Warrior
description: Active and checking in for 4 consecutive weekends.

name: Unstoppable
description: Maintained an active streak of 30 days without missing a single day.

name: TasteMap Addict
description: 100-day streak! TasteMap is officially your lifestyle.

name: Trend Setter
description: You checked in at a location before it went viral (Top 10 trending).

name: Ghost Hunter
description: Discovered and checked in at a location that had zero previous reviews.

name: The Pioneer
description: Awarded to the first 1,000 alpha testers of TasteMap. Thank you for believing in us!

name: Genesis
description: You were here on Day 1. A true founding member who witnessed the birth of TasteMap.

name: The First 100
description: One of the first 100 foodies to ever join the platform. Your legacy is forever secured.

name: Beta Voyager
description: Participated in the TasteMap Beta testing phase. Thank you for your invaluable feedback!

name: The Architect
description: Creator and builder of the TasteMap universe. (Admin Exclusive)

name: The Overseer
description: Keeping the TasteMap community safe, clean, and thriving. (Moderator Exclusive)

name: Bug Smasher
description: Helped the Dev team identify and squash a critical bug in the system. You saved the day!

name: Community Champion
description: The official voice of TasteMap. Hosting events, creating challenges, and keeping vibes high.

name: Admin
description: TasteMap's Final Boss. I have the power to 'DROP TABLE' at any moment, so please behave.

name: Tester
description: Professional App Breaker. I click buttons in the wrong order just to watch the Devs cry.
